privacy:
At AlexyYah Transportation, we take the privacy of our applicants seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard the personal information you provide when applying to become a driver with our company. By using our website and submitting your information, you consent to the practices described in this policy.

1. Information We Collect

When you apply to become a driver, we may collect the following information:

  • Full name and contact details (phone number, email address, and home address)
  • Driver's license information and driving history
  • Vehicle details, including proof of insurance
  • Background check and employment history information
  • Any additional documents or details required for compliance with safety standards

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information collected for the following purposes:

  • To evaluate your application and determine your eligibility as a driver
  • To contact you regarding your application or related opportunities
  • To comply with legal and regulatory requirements related to student transportation
  • To ensure the safety and reliability of our services

3. Sharing of Information

We respect your privacy and will never sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. Your information will only be shared under the following circumstances:

  • With authorized staff members directly involved in the recruitment and onboarding process
  • If required by law, regulation, or valid legal process (e.g., court order)
  • To protect the safety, rights, and property of our company, our drivers, and the students we serve

4. Data Security

We implement reasonable technical, administrative, and physical safeguards to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or disclosure. While no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, we strive to protect your data to the best of our ability.

5. Data Retention

We retain applicant information only as long as necessary to complete the recruitment and compliance process, or as required by law. Once the information is no longer needed, we securely delete or anonymize it.

6. Your Rights

As an applicant, you have the right to:

  • Access the personal information we hold about you
  • Request corrections or updates to your information
  • Request the deletion of your personal data, where legally applicable
  • Withdraw your application at any time

7. Changes to This Policy

We reserve the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with the updated date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

8. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please contact us at:

Email: support@alexyah.com
Phone: (510) 962-4394
terms:
Welcome to the AlexyYah Transportation website. These Terms of Use govern your access and use of our site. By visiting and using this website, you agree to comply with these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use this website.

1. Purpose of the Website

This website is intended to provide information about our transportation services and to allow individuals to apply as drivers for our company. It may not be used for unlawful, misleading, or unauthorized purposes.

2. Applicant Responsibilities

When submitting an application, you agree to:

  • Provide accurate, truthful, and complete information
  • Not impersonate another person or submit fraudulent applications
  • Keep your information up to date

3. No Guarantee of Employment

Submitting an application does not guarantee selection or employment as a driver. We reserve the right to reject or accept applicants based on our internal hiring standards and compliance with legal regulations.

4. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of AlexyYah Transportation or its licensors. You may not copy, distribute, modify, or use any content without prior written consent.

5. Limitation of Liability

While we strive to keep the website accurate and up to date, AlexyYah Transportation is not responsible for errors, technical issues, or interruptions of service. Use of this website is at your own risk.

6. Prohibited Uses

You may not use this site to:

  • Submit harmful, illegal, or offensive content
  • Attempt to disrupt or hack the website's functionality
  • Collect data about other applicants without consent

7. Modifications

We reserve the right to update or revise these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon being posted on this page. Continued use of the site indicates acceptance of the new terms.

8. Governing Law

These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the State of California, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts located in California.

9. Contact Us

If you have questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at:

Email: support@alexyah.com
Phone: (510) 962-4394

10. SMS Consent

By opting into SMS from a web form or other medium, you are agreeing to receive SMS messages from Alexyah Transportation. This includes SMS messages for customer care and account notifications. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. See our Privacy Policy for more details. Message HELP for help. Reply STOP to any message to opt out.
